About Us

Bhubaneswar's Trusted Home Solutions Partner

Prangya Enterprises has been serving homes and offices across Bhubaneswar and Odisha with reliable, modern and aesthetic door, window and balcony solutions. We focus on safety, comfort, durability, and clean installation.

From invisible grills that protect your children without blocking your view, to pleated mosquito nets, bird nets, stretch ceilings, and custom door/window solutions — we handle it all under one roof.

🏆
Quality Guaranteed
Premium materials, professional installation, zero compromise
🏠
Free Site Visit
Expert consultation at your doorstep, no charges
⚡
Fast Installation
Same-week service delivery on most products
🛡️
After-Sales Support
We stand behind every installation we complete

Comprehensive door, window and balcony solutions designed for Indian homes and offices.

Invisible Grill

Powder-coated aluminium frame
Custom sizes for any opening
Easy to clean & maintain

Bird Net

Ventilation-friendly design
